title: Read a manifest for safety gaps
description: Inspect a Deployment/Helm output and report missing probes, unset resources, risky RBAC, and secret exposure.
body: Use when asked whether a workload manifest is production-safe. Actions: read the rendered manifest and verify readiness/liveness presence and targets, resource requests/limits set sensibly, RBAC scoped (no wildcards/cluster-admin), Secrets mounted rather than plaintext env, and a sane rollout strategy plus PDB. Do not assume defaults are safe (no probe means traffic to unready pods; no limits means OOM risk). Record each gap with the file/field and classify as availability, isolation, privilege, or secret-exposure. This skill is read-only and must not apply changes without runtime permission. Validation signals include a concrete list of fields and their risk class. Risk boundary: report any secret-in-env or cluster-admin grant as a blocking finding and recommend escalation.
